title: CREATING MEMORIES FOR DISABLED CHILDREN - 211info
text: CREATING MEMORIES FOR DISABLED CHILDREN CREATING MEMORIES FOR DISABLED CHILDREN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a camp and cabin stays. Offers outdoor activities such as hiking, fishing, and pontoon boat rides. 59895 Pollock Road Joseph, OR 97846 Eligibility: Families who have children with disabilities Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 771-6628 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 771-6628 Jack Burgoyne Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
